class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.pre_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 384)
        self.act0 = nn.Tanh()
        self.drop0 = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(384, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)
        x = hidden_states[:, -1, :]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.drop0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.pre_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 256)
        self.act0 = nn.GELU()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(256, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)
        x = hidden_states.max(dim=1)[0]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.pre_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 128)
        self.act0 = nn.Tanh()
        self.drop0 = nn.Dropout(0.2)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(128, 256)
        self.act1 = nn.Tanh()
        self.drop1 = nn.Dropout(0.2)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)
        x = hidden_states.mean(dim=1)
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.drop0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.act1(x)
        x = self.drop1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

class Adapter(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model: int, output_dim: int):
        super().__init__()
        self.pre_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc0 = nn.Linear(d_model, 384)
        self.act0 = nn.ReLU()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(384, 64)
        self.act1 = nn.ReLU()
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(64, output_dim)

    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        hidden_states = self.pre_norm(hidden_states)
        x = hidden_states.max(dim=1)[0]
        x = self.fc0(x)
        x = self.act0(x)
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.act1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x
